---
title: "Part C"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(survey)
library(gtsummary)
library(tableone)
library(here)

# Dataset 
nhanes_clean <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "nhanes_bmd_pediatric_master.rds"))

# Verification
cat("--- DATASET VERIFICATION ---\n")
cat("Total Raw Sample Loaded (N): ", nrow(nhanes_clean), "\n")
cat("Analytic Subpopulation (subpop == 1): ", sum(nhanes_clean$subpop == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
## Calculated weighted quantiles for exposure
# Temporary survey design to extract weighted quantiles within subpop
temp_design <- svydesign(
  id = ~SDMVPSU,
  strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
  weights = ~WTMEC6YR,
  nest = TRUE,
  data = nhanes_clean %>% filter(subpop == 1)
)

# Extract weighted 25th, 50th, and 75th percentiles of total screen time
screen_quantiles <- svyquantile(
  ~total_screen_time,
  design = temp_design,
  quantiles = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

# Cutpoints
q25 <- as.numeric(screen_quantiles$total_screen_time[1, "quantile"])
q50 <- as.numeric(screen_quantiles$total_screen_time[2, "quantile"])
q75 <- as.numeric(screen_quantiles$total_screen_time[3, "quantile"])
```

```{r}
## Factors for Table 1 
# --- PREPARE FACTORS FOR TABLE 1 ---
nhanes_table1_prep <- nhanes_clean %>%
  mutate(
    # Screen Time Quartiles
    screen_quartiles = case_when(
      total_screen_time <= q25 ~ paste0("Q1 (<= ", q25, " hrs) [Ref]"),
      total_screen_time > q25 & total_screen_time <= q50 ~ paste0("Q2 (", q25, "-", q50, " hrs)"),
      total_screen_time > q50 & total_screen_time <= q75 ~ paste0("Q3 (", q50, "-", q75, " hrs)"),
      total_screen_time > q75 ~ paste0("Q4 (> ", q75, " hrs)"),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% as.factor(),
    
    # Sex: Convert to factor if numeric, or convert directly if already text
    sex_fact = as.factor(RIAGENDR),
    
    # Race: Keep the existing clean text labels from master file
    race_fact = as.factor(RIDRETH3),
    
    # Parent Education
    parent_edu_fact = case_when(
      parent_edu %in% c(1, 2, "Less than high school", "High school graduate/GED or equivalent") ~ "High School or Less", # Adjusts if text or numeric
      parent_edu %in% c(3, 4, 5, "Some college or AA degree", "College graduate or above") ~ "Some College or Above",
      TRUE ~ as.character(parent_edu)
    ) %>% as.factor(),
    
    # Poverty Income Ratio (PIR)
    pir_num = as.numeric(INDFMPIR),
    pir_cat = case_when(
      pir_num < 1.30 ~ "Low Income (< 130% PIR)",
      pir_num >= 1.30 & pir_num <= 3.50 ~ "Middle Income (130-350% PIR)",
      pir_num > 3.50 ~ "High Income (> 350% PIR)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Low Income (< 130% PIR)", "Middle Income (130-350% PIR)", "High Income (> 350% PIR)"))
  )
```

```{r}
## Primary survey design
nhanes_design_full <- svydesign(
  id = ~SDMVPSU,
  strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
  weights = ~WTMEC6YR,
  nest = TRUE,
  data = nhanes_table1_prep
)

# Isolating analytic subpop
nhanes_design_sub <- subset(nhanes_design_full, subpop == 1 & !is.na(screen_quartiles))
```

```{r}
## TABLE 1 
# 1. Survey design objects & drop unused factor levels in subpopulation
nhanes_design_full <- svydesign(
  id = ~SDMVPSU,
  strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
  weights = ~WTMEC6YR,
  nest = TRUE,
  data = nhanes_table1_prep
)

nhanes_design_sub <- subset(
  nhanes_design_full, 
  subpop == 1 & !is.na(screen_quartiles)
)

nhanes_design_sub$variables <- nhanes_design_sub$variables %>%
  mutate(
    sex_fact = droplevels(as.factor(sex_fact)),
    race_fact = droplevels(as.factor(race_fact)),
    parent_edu_fact = droplevels(as.factor(parent_edu_fact)),
    pir_cat = droplevels(as.factor(pir_cat)),
    screen_quartiles = droplevels(as.factor(screen_quartiles))
  )

# 2. Render Survey-Weighted Table 1
tbl_1 <- nhanes_design_sub %>%
  tbl_svysummary(
    by = screen_quartiles,
    include = c(
      RIDAGEYR, 
      sex_fact, 
      race_fact, 
      parent_edu_fact, 
      pir_cat, 
      total_screen_time, 
      bmd_zscore_adj
    ),
    label = list(
      RIDAGEYR ~ "Age (years)",
      sex_fact ~ "Sex",
      race_fact ~ "Race / Ethnicity",
      parent_edu_fact ~ "Parental Education",
      pir_cat ~ "Poverty Income Ratio (PIR)",
      total_screen_time ~ "Total Screen Time (hrs/day)",
      bmd_zscore_adj ~ "Height-Adjusted BMD Z-Score"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n_unweighted} ({p}%)"
    ),
    digits = list(
      all_continuous() ~ 1,
      all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_overall(last = FALSE) %>%
  add_p() %>% # gtsummary automatically applies design-adjusted survey tests here!
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Demographic / Clinical Variable**")

tbl_1
print(tbl_1)
```
